nasb.text: Now therefore, behold, the Lord is about to bring on them the strong and abundant waters of the Euphrates, Even the king of Assyria and all his glory; And it will rise up over all its channels and go over all its banks.

esv.text: therefore, behold, the Lord is bringing up against them the waters of the River, mighty and many, the king of Assyria and all his glory. And it will rise over all its channels and go over all its banks,

cnv.text: 因此，主必使大河又強又大的水臨到他們， 就是亞述王和他一切威榮， 水必漲起來，高過所有的水道；水要氾濫，漫過所有的河岸；

ccb.text: 我要差来亚述王的军队，使他们像幼发拉底河的洪流一样汹涌而来，淹没一切水道，漫过河岸，

csbs.text: 因此，看哪，主必使大河猛烈的众水， 就是亚述王和他所有的威势， 上涨淹没他们， 又上涨淹没一切水道， 漫过所有的河岸；
